latest.title: Strategic Streaming, Treasury and Asset Update
latest.content:
Today 07:00
RNS Number : 1050H
Bluebird Mining Ventures Ltd
05 June 2026
5 June 2026
Bluebird Mining Ventures Ltd
("BMV" or the "Company")
Strategic Streaming, Treasury and Asset Update
Bluebird Mining Ventures Ltd (LSE: BMV), the gold streaming, mining and treasury company, is pleased to provide the following update regarding the continued execution of its streaming and treasury strategy, including operational progress across its streaming activities, treasury accumulation, and deployment of mining infrastructure.
Streaming and Operating Business Update
The Company continues to build its operating streaming business across Bitcoin and precious-metals-related cash flow opportunities.
During May 2026, the Company marked an important milestone for BMV with the delivery of its first full month of revenue generation from operating assets. While still early in the Company's development, this represents a significant step in the transition from portfolio construction towards recurring cash flow generation.
Management views this as an important milestone in the evolution of the business and a demonstration of the Company's ability to convert assets into recurring economic output.
Additionally, the Company continued to strengthen its operating platform through targeted hires across Operations, Commercial and Finance. These additions have been made while maintaining BMV's disciplined and lean operating model, with a continued emphasis on equity-based incentives and long-term alignment with shareholders.
The Company also completed the restructuring of the legacy Asian assets. This work forms part of a broader effort to simplify the business, strengthen the balance sheet and improve capital efficiency.
Over the past twelve months, substantial progress has been made across both the asset and liability side of the balance sheet. As a result, management believes as BMV approaches the second half of 2026, it does so from a significantly stronger financial position than at any point in its recent history.
Looking ahead, the Company remains focused on expanding its portfolio of productive assets, growing recurring yield and executing on several strategic initiatives that are expected to further enhance shareholder value. Additional updates regarding the Company's yield-generation strategies will be provided in due course.
Gold Streaming Opportunities
Development work continues on BMV's flagship gold streaming opportunity. The Company believes the asset has the potential to become a cornerstone investment within the portfolio and remains focused on advancing the opportunity in a disciplined manner.
In parallel, management continues to evaluate a number of additional streaming and royalty opportunities. Consistent with the Company's investment philosophy, priority is being given to transactions
capable of delivering near and medium-term cash generation,
that offer strong downside protection, attractive risk-adjusted returns and high-quality counterparties.
Treasury Activities
The Company continues to maintain exposure to both gold and Bitcoin through its treasury strategy. Management remains constructive on the long-term role of scarce monetary assets and continues to view treasury management as a core component of shareholder value creation.

Sath Ganesarajah, Chief Executive Officer of BMV, commented:
"Having become revenue generating in April, we are thrilled to have delivered our first full month of revenue generation in May. This milestone strongly validates the success of the restructuring activities we have been undertaking to date in supporting our transition into a focused gold streaming, mining and treasury company, and the business case for this transition."
For further information, please contact:
Bluebird Mining Ventures Ltd
Sath Ganesarajah, Chief Executive Officer
c/o +44 (0)20 4582 3500
Gracechurch Group
Harry Chathli, Alexis Gore, Anysia Virdi
+44 (0)20 4582 3500
About Bluebird Mining Ventures Ltd
Bluebird Mining Ventures (LSE: BMV) is a gold streaming, mining and treasury company. The Company's mission is to build and manage a gold-backed treasury through streaming agreements, providing investors with exposure to physical gold without the operational risk of mining.
BMV focuses on streams from producing assets within the ore-concentrate-to-bullion value chain. Its investments secure multi-year flows of gold that can be recycled into new transactions. This model enables scalable exposure to gold without capital expenditure, or execution risks.
Drawing on its heritage in gold, BMV combines the stability of physical bullion with the benefits of a scalable, disciplined business model. With a focus on prudent capital allocation and treasury management, BMV aims to deliver sustainable, long-term value for shareholders.
For more information, please visit:
www.bmvbtc.com

latest.title: Update on South Korean Gold Interests
latest.content:
Today 07:00
RNS Number : 3354G
Bluebird Mining Ventures Ltd
01 June 2026
1 June 2026
Bluebird Mining Ventures Ltd
("BMV" or the "Company")
Update on South Korean Gold Interests
Bluebird Mining Ventures Ltd (LSE: BMV), the gold streaming, mining and treasury company, is pleased to announce that it has restructured its exposure to the South Korean assets through a Share Purchase Agreement ("SPA") with 1575275 B.C. Ltd, a newly formed company incorporated in British Columbia, Canada, founded by Latika Prasad, an experienced mining executive based in Vancouver.
Under the terms of the SPA, 1575275 B.C. Ltd. will assume direct ownership of the South Korean mining interests and responsibility for all future funding, associated liabilities and obligations relating to the assets. BMV will transfer the assets to 1575275 B.C. Ltd. for a nominal consideration and will retain a 2.5% Net Smelter Return from both South Korean projects, Gubong and Kochang. 1575275 B.C. Ltd will have the right to buy-out the royalties for USD 2.5 million at each project.
The assets currently lack a JORC-compliant Mineral Resource Estimate or production approvals. Whilst the geology remains attractive, BMV considers the assets to be at an early-stage of development and carrying exploration risk.
The Board believes restructuring the South Korean gold interests, while retaining exposure through a royalty, better aligns the Company with its strategic focus and materially simplifies its structure, reducing future administrative and audit complexity.
Sath Ganesarajah, Chief Executive Officer of BMV, commented:
"The restructure of our South Korean mining interests is an important step in BMV's transition into a focused gold streaming, mining and treasury company. While Gubong and Kochang remain geologically attractive assets, the permitting pathway, development timeline and capital requirements are no longer aligned with our strategic priority of building a lower-risk, cash-generative platform.
"By transferring the assets to an experienced Vancouver-based mining team while retaining a 2.5% royalty over each project, BMV preserves meaningful upside exposure without the ongoing operational, administrative and funding burden. This transaction completes the transition of our legacy owned South Korean gold interests into potential royalty revenue streams and allows management to focus capital and resources on scalable streaming and royalty opportunities capable of delivering recurring cash flow and long-term shareholder value."
For further information, please contact:
Bluebird Mining Ventures Ltd
Sath Ganesarajah, Chief Executive Officer
c/o +44 (0)20 4582 3500
Gracechurch Group
Harry Chathli, Alexis Gore, Anysia Virdi
+44 (0)20 4582 3500
About Bluebird Mining Ventures Ltd
Bluebird Mining Ventures (LSE: BMV) is a gold streaming, mining and treasury company. The Company's mission is to build and manage a gold-backed treasury through streaming agreements, providing investors with exposure to physical gold without the operational risk of mining.
BMV focuses on streams from producing assets within the ore concentrate to bullion value chain. Its investments secure multi-year flows of gold that can be recycled into new transactions. This model enables scalable exposure to gold without capital expenditure, or execution risks.
Drawing on its heritage in gold, BMV combines the stability of physical bullion with the benefits of a scalable, disciplined business model. With a focus on prudent capital allocation and treasury management, BMV aims to deliver sustainable, long-term value for shareholders.
For more information, please visit: www.bmvbtc.com

latest.title: Strategic Streaming, Treasury and Asset Update
latest.content:
Today 07:00
RNS Number : 4218E
Bluebird Mining Ventures Ltd
15 May 2026
15 May 2026
Bluebird Mining Ventures Ltd
("BMV" or the "Company")
Strategic Streaming, Treasury and Asset Update
Bluebird Mining Ventures Ltd (LSE: BMV), the gold streaming, mining and treasury company, is pleased to provide the following update regarding the continued execution of its streaming and treasury strategy, including operational progress across its streaming activities, treasury accumulation, and deployment of mining infrastructure.
Streaming and Operating Business Update
The Company continues to build its operating streaming business across Bitcoin and precious-metals-related cash flow opportunities.
During April 2026, the Company generated its first revenues in its history through its developing streaming and digital asset activities, representing an important milestone in BMV's strategic transition toward cash-generative operating assets and treasury accumulation.
The Company's current estimated streaming and operating asset value is approximately US$508,870, comprising existing Bitcoin streaming and hashrate-linked contracts.

The Company is aiming to deliver 20+% IRR at the portfolio level.
Gold Streaming Strategy Update
The Company continues to evaluate a number of gold streaming opportunities in partnership with Raptor Capital International Ltd, including the previously referenced Crawford Gold Project ("Crawford") opportunity. As those discussions progressed, the Company identified additional opportunities with materially lower development and execution risk profiles, including structures supported by existing production and operating cash flows. As a result, management has prioritised its capital allocation toward these lower-risk opportunities.
The Board remains disciplined in its capital allocation approach and will prioritise transactions capable of delivering near and medium-term cash generation with reduced permitting, construction, and development exposure. While discussions regarding Crawford remain ongoing, there can be no certainty that the Company will proceed with the transaction in its originally contemplated form, or at all.
Treasury NAV Update
In addition to the Company's operating streaming activities, BMV continues to accumulate treasury assets consisting primarily of Bitcoin, tokenised gold, physical gold, and cash balances.
The Company's estimated unaudited Treasury Net Asset Value ("Treasury NAV") as at 12 May 2026 is approximately US$0.8 million.

The Company notes that all NAV figures are management estimates based on prevailing market prices, internal models, and contractual assessments and have not been independently audited.
Cascadia Industries Bitcoin Deployment Arrangement
BMV has entered into a Bitcoin Mining Deployment and Streaming Arrangement term sheet with Cascadia Industries Ltd ("Cascadia"), a new British Columbia-based infrastructure developer, regarding the deployment of approximately 750 Bitcoin mining units currently owned by the Company.
Under the proposed structure:
·
BMV retains full ownership of all mining equipment;
·
Cascadia will provide infrastructure, hosting, power, operations, and deployment capital;
·
The arrangement is intended to operate on a zero-capex and zero-opex basis for BMV;
·
Miners will only operate when economically profitable;
·
Net Bitcoin production is expected to flow directly to BMV-designated wallets; and
·
Substantial deployment is targeted within six months.
The Board believes this structure provides low-risk optionality on future Bitcoin upside while monetising currently dormant mining infrastructure without requiring material new capital expenditure from the Company.
Sath Ganesarajah, Chief Executive Officer of BMV, commented:
"Over recent months we have continued repositioning BMV towards a streaming and treasury platform focused on hard assets, recurring cash flow generation, and disciplined capital allocation.
"Generating our first operating revenues in April represents an important milestone for the Company and validates the early stages of this strategic transition.
"The Company is steadily simplifying its legacy structure while building exposure to Bitcoin, gold, streaming interests, and treasury assets capable of compounding shareholder value over time.
"We believe the combination of streaming economics, treasury accumulation, and structured real asset exposure creates a differentiated platform with significant long-term optionality."
For further information, please contact:
Bluebird Mining Ventures Ltd
Sath Ganesarajah, Chief Executive Officer
c/o +44 (0)20 4582 3500
Gracechurch Group
Harry Chathli, Alexis Gore, Anysia Virdi
+44 (0)20 4582 3500

Bluebird Mining Ventures (LSE: BMV) is a gold streaming, mining and treasury company. The Company's mission is to build and manage a gold-backed treasury through streaming agreements, providing investors with exposure to physical gold without the operational risk of mining.
BMV focuses on streams from producing assets within the ore concentrate to bullion value chain. Its investments secure multi-year flows of gold that can be recycled into new transactions. This model enables scalable exposure to gold without capital expenditure, or execution risks.
Drawing on its heritage in gold, BMV combines the stability of physical bullion with the benefits of a scalable, disciplined business model. With a focus on prudent capital allocation and treasury management, BMV aims to deliver sustainable, long-term value for shareholders.
For more information, please visit: www.bmvbtc.com

company_30s.what_they_do: BMV Ltd. operates as a multi‑asset holding platform, offering streaming services, treasury‑focused financial products, and a portfolio that includes gold and emerging crypto projects such as a Texas‑based Bitcoin mining initiative.
company_30s.why_they_matter: The company sits at the crossroads of three high‑growth arenas: consumer streaming, digital asset mining, and precious‑metal investments. Each sector commands billions in global demand, and BMV’s cross‑asset strategy gives it a foothold in markets that are still in a rapid expansion phase.
company_30s.current_state: BMV is currently restructuring its capital base after a recent £750k fundraising round, tightening its balance sheet and realigning its management incentives. The company is still in an early‑stage turnaround phase, trading at a price that reflects a deep valuation cut from its pre‑crash levels.

rns_narrative: The company has been busy refocusing its business model: it announced a new streaming arm, a treasury‑management platform, and a strategic partnership in Texas for Bitcoin mining, all aimed at diversifying revenue streams.

Concurrently, BMV has undertaken a series of corporate governance moves—admitting new shares, extending the audit partner’s tenure, and adjusting its capital structure—to shore up investor confidence and improve liquidity.
These actions suggest the firm is actively seeking a catalyst that can signal a turnaround, rather than simply waiting for a market‑wide rebound.

crowd_tape.dominant_theme: Quietly skeptical – the community is largely silent, with a handful of mixed posts that neither rally nor panics.
crowd_tape.bull_narrative: A few traders highlight the company’s pivot to crypto mining and streaming as a potential game‑changer, but they lack concrete evidence and remain cautious.
crowd_tape.bear_narrative: Others point to the repeated need for capital raises and the lack of a clear revenue source, warning that the firm may still be a cash‑burning venture.
crowd_tape.sentiment_shift: The mood has shifted from vague indifference to a more cautious optimism, as new RNS items hint at a possible catalyst, but the overall engagement level remains low.

whats_happening_now.attention_check: Google Trends for BMV is flat, indicating no public search interest and a high potential for surprise when a catalyst materializes.

near_term_catalysts: A formal launch of the Texas Bitcoin mining project – if the company can secure the necessary permits and announce a first‑quarter output figure, it could signal a shift to a profitable revenue stream.
Positive quarterly earnings that show a turnaround in cash flow, especially if the streaming division reports a spike in subscriber numbers.
A significant uptick in trading volume that exceeds the 20‑day moving average, suggesting renewed investor interest after a prolonged slump.
expect_next.watch_for: Key data points include: (1) the first quarterly earnings report after the funding round, (2) any official statement confirming operational readiness of the Texas mining site, and (3) a sustained 3‑day volume spike that is at least twice the 20‑day average.
expect_next.timing_regime: BMV appears to be in the early‑capitulation phase of a deep crash. The APEX compression score is high, indicating a tight trading range that could snap once a catalyst hits. Confirmation will come from a breakout above the recent low, coupled with a surge in volume.

buy_vs_sell.bull_case: The stock has suffered a deep decline that exceeds 70% of its peak, positioning it as a prime candidate for a mean‑reversion play. If the price rebounds to the midpoint of its 52‑week range, the upside would be roughly 150% relative to the current level. Given the historical average return of 39% for green signals, a recovery to 50% of the pre‑crash price could deliver a 2‑to‑1 reward on capital invested.
buy_vs_sell.bear_case: The firm still lacks a proven revenue engine; the streaming arm has yet to show traction, and the crypto mining project is in a regulatory gray zone. If the company fails to secure the Texas project or if the new capital raise is insufficient, the downside could erode another 20–30% before the next cycle begins.
buy_vs_sell.risk_reward: Risk is limited to a 10–15% loss if the price stays flat for 60 days. Reward potential exceeds 150% if the stock recovers to the 52‑week high. The asymmetry is therefore favorable for a contrarian position.

playbook.if_bullish: Enter when the price closes above the recent low and volume is at least 1.5× the 20‑day average. Allocate 10% of the trading capital per position, set a stop 10% below the entry to protect against a false breakout, and scale in with a 25% increase if the price reaches the 50‑day moving average.
playbook.if_watching: Trigger an entry if the company announces a definitive launch date for the Texas mining project or if the streaming division reports a 25% YoY subscriber growth. These events would provide the catalyst needed for a mean‑reversion to materialize.
playbook.if_passing: If the company files for bankruptcy, is delisted, or a fraud claim surfaces, exit immediately. No other terminal risk has been identified at this time.

ai_insights.bottom_line: BMV is a deep‑crashed, low‑sentiment play with a clear catalyst window in the next 2–3 months; its upside potential far outweighs the limited downside, making it a compelling contrarian long.
